picks.quote: I picked Hrgović. He He doesn't win at that next level. Hrgović was the next level.
We gave out Keyshawn Davis to win by KO. Uh in the end, he didn't. He won by decision.
Ngannou did what we expected him to do. Blasted him out of there in one round.
Perry's active, you know, Perry's younger... he's in better shape. And uh Look, Diaz has taken punishment before... it probably wasn't enough.
Ronda she did what she used to do. You know, uh she she got that arm lock.
Holloway, at least we know. We know that he's still good at that level at a certain level... But, he's been active. So, you got to give him the edge that way.
We got a better chance of seeing our King Tut make a comeback than we than we do of seeing um Verhoeven uh pull off which would be beyond the upset.
